caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with bold text on it. The setting appears to be a casual studio environment, with framed photographs and memorabilia adorning the walls behind him. To his right, there is a mannequin dressed in a white shirt and green pants, suggesting that the location might also serve as a clothing store or a space where fashion is showcased. The man seems engaged in conversation, possibly discussing topics related to business, entrepreneurship, or personal experiences, given the context of the podcast's title. The overall atmosphere is relaxed yet professional, with a focus on dialogue and storytelling.
